title: gymnogramma woodsioides
intro: Gymnogramma woodsioides, also known as False Rattlesnake Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin infections. Gymnogramma woodsioides can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional African medicine to promote overall well-being.
